justification: The diff only updates pom.xml (Spring Boot 2.2.6 -> 3.3.13, Java 8 -> 21) and cleans up imports in MavenWrapperDownloader.java, but contains no Java source code changes to demonstrate Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads). While it removes the JUnit Vintage exclusion (good for modern testing), the lack of actual Java 21 language feature adoption and minimal code modernization limits the score.
